system.name: Vedic Predictive Astrology
system.description: Comprehensive techniques for predicting life events and timing
system.purpose: Accurate prediction of life events, timing, and outcomes
system.importance: Core application of astrology for practical life guidance
system.vedicReferences: Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra, Jataka Parijata, Phaladeepika, Saravali
system.accuracy: High when multiple techniques confirm same timing

predictionTechniques.name: Dasha-Bhukti Analysis
predictionTechniques.description: Analysis of major and sub-periods for event timing
predictionTechniques.methodology: Check dasha lord, bhukti lord, and their relationship to houses and planets

steps.analysis: Check planet's nature, house rulership, placement, strength
Check sub-period lord's nature and relationship with mahadasha lord
Friends, enemies, neutral? Yoga formation? Aspect relationship?
Which houses do dasha-bhukti lords rule? Their significations will manifest
Houses where dasha-bhukti lords are placed show areas of activity
Planets aspected by dasha-bhukti lords will activate

eventTiming.marriage: 7th lord's dasha-bhukti, Venus dasha-bhukti, 7th house activations
eventTiming.career: 10th lord's dasha-bhukti, Sun/Saturn dasha-bhukti, 10th house activations
eventTiming.children: 5th lord's dasha-bhukti, Jupiter dasha-bhukti, 5th house activations
eventTiming.property: 4th lord's dasha-bhukti, Mars dasha-bhukti, 4th house activations
eventTiming.wealth: 2nd/11th lord dasha-bhukti, Jupiter/Venus dasha-bhukti, wealth house activations
eventTiming.health: 6th/8th lord dasha-bhukti, malefic dasha-bhukti, afflicted house activations
eventTiming.spiritual: 9th/12th lord dasha-bhukti, Jupiter/Ketu dasha-bhukti, spiritual house activations
eventTiming.foreign: 12th lord dasha-bhukti, Rahu dasha-bhukti, foreign significator activations

predictionTechniques.pratyantarDasha: Further subdivision for precise timing within antardasha
predictionTechniques.sookshmaDasha: Even more precise timing for specific dates
predictionTechniques.example: Marriage timing: Jupiter MD, Venus AD, Moon PD in 7th from Moon with transit Jupiter over natal Venus

predictionTechniques.name: Transit Analysis
predictionTechniques.description: Current planetary positions triggering natal chart points
predictionTechniques.principles: Transiting planets activate natal house positions and aspects

majorTransits.effects: Expansion, growth, fortune, wisdom in houses transited
keyTransits: Over natal Jupiter - wisdom peak, fortune
Over natal Venus - marriage, wealth, arts
Over 7th house - marriage possibility
Over 1st house - new beginnings, growth
Over 10th house - career advancement
majorTransits.significance: Events blessed by Jupiter transit are auspicious and lasting

majorTransits.effects: Tests, lessons, delays, maturity, discipline in houses transited
keyTransits: Over natal Moon (Sade Sati) - 7.5 year testing period
Over natal Sun - authority challenges, ego tests
Over 1st house - physical tests, maturity
Over 7th house - relationship tests
Over 10th house - career responsibility, hard work
majorTransits.sadeSati: 2.5 years before, during, and after Moon sign - major life testing period
majorTransits.significance: Events during Saturn transit teach important life lessons

majorTransits.effects: Sudden changes, foreign connections, spiritual evolution
keyTransits: Over natal Moon - mental turbulence, foreign
Over 1st-7th axis - identity and relationship changes
Over 4th-10th axis - home and career upheavals
Natal Rahu-Ketu return - major karmic completion
majorTransits.significance: Events during nodal transit are karmic and transformative

majorTransits.effects: Energy, action, conflicts, courage, property matters
keyTransits: Over natal Mars - energy peak, accidents if afflicted
Over 1st house - assertiveness, energy boost
Over 4th house - property matters, mother issues
Over 7th house - marital conflicts or passion
Over 10th house - career action, competition
majorTransits.significance: Events require action, courage, and careful energy management

majorTransits.effects: Love, luxury, arts, beauty, relationships, wealth
keyTransits: Over natal Venus - love peak, beauty enhancement
Over 7th house - romance, marriage possibilities
Over 2nd house - wealth gains, food pleasures
Over 5th house - creative expression, romance
majorTransits.significance: Events bring pleasure, beauty, and relationship focus

keyTransits: Over natal Mercury - intellect peak, communication
Over 3rd house - writing, communication projects
Over 10th house - business matters, career communication
majorTransits.significance: Events involve intellect, communication, and business

predictionTechniques.vedhaPoints: Obstruction points that block transit benefits
predictionTechniques.transitFromMoon: Also check transits from Moon lagna for emotional effects
predictionTechniques.doubleTransit: Jupiter-Saturn transits to same house give strong results

predictionTechniques.name: Varshaphal (Annual Chart)
predictionTechniques.description: Solar return chart cast for exact Sun return each year
predictionTechniques.calculation: Chart cast for moment Sun returns to exact birth longitude
predictionTechniques.purpose: Year-specific predictions from birthday to birthday

keyElements.significance: Shows year's overall theme and focus
keyElements.analysis: Lord, planets in Varsha lagna, aspects

keyElements.description: Progressed point moving one sign per year from birth lagna
keyElements.calculation: Age modulo 12 = sign from birth lagna
keyElements.significance: Year's destiny point, shows year's direction

keyElements.description: Lord of sign where Muntha falls
keyElements.importance: Most important planet for the year
keyElements.analysis: Year lord's strength, placement determines year's success

keyElements.description: Five special aspects used in annual predictions
keyElements.significance: Show event likelihood and timing within year

keyElements.description: Arabic parts for specific life areas
Special dasha system for annual chart

interpretation: Look for Rajayogas in annual chart
Check houses from Varsha lagna for yearly themes
Combine with birth chart and current dashas
predictionTechniques.example: Strong Jupiter in Varsha lagna with Muntha in 9th house indicates fortunate year with spiritual growth

predictionTechniques.name: Prashna (Horary) Astrology
predictionTechniques.description: Chart cast for moment of question to answer specific queries
predictionTechniques.principle: Universe arranges chart at question moment to reflect answer
predictionTechniques.applications: Lost objects, yes/no questions, event outcomes, hidden matters

methodology.details: Exact time and place when question asked or reaches astrologer
Querent = questioner (usually 1st house), Quesited = question subject (relevant house)
Is chart fit to judge? Lagna not in beginning/end degrees, benefics in kendras/trikonas
Marriage question? Check 7th house. Career? Check 10th house
Moon's position, aspects, nakshatra are crucial
Special rules like Udvega, Vishti, etc.

houseSignifications.4th: Mother, home, property, vehicles, lost objects (immovable)
houseSignifications.9th: Father, fortune, long travels, spirituality, legal matters
houseSignifications.11th: Gains, profits, fulfillment of desires, friends
houseSignifications.12th: Losses, expenses, foreign lands, imprisonment, hospitalization

specialTechniques: Lost object location by Moon's nakshatra
Timing by Moon's distance from significator
predictionTechniques.example: Lost object question: Check 2nd house for movable, 4th for immovable; Moon's nakshatra shows direction

predictionTechniques.name: Divisional Chart Analysis
predictionTechniques.description: Use specific divisional charts for detailed event analysis
predictionTechniques.principle: Each varga shows one life area in detail
predictionTechniques.application: Check relevant varga for specific predictions

mappings.analysis: 7th house in D9, Venus in D9, 7th lord D9 position, dasha activation
10th house in D10, Sun/Saturn in D10, 10th lord D10 position, career yogas in D10
5th house in D7, Jupiter in D7, 5th lord D7 position, children timing
2nd/4th/5th houses in D24, Mercury/Jupiter in D24, educational yogas
4th house in D4, Mars in D4, property yogas, timing
Sun/Moon in Hora, wealth houses, Jupiter/Venus strength
9th/12th houses in D20, Jupiter in D20, spiritual yogas
6th/8th houses in D30, malefics in D30, disease indicators
3rd house in D3, Mars in D3, sibling count and quality
4th house in D16, Venus in D16, comfort level
Overall D60 strength, karmic patterns, life purpose

predictionTechniques.combinedAnalysis: Event manifests when both D1 and relevant varga show indication
predictionTechniques.timing: Use D1 dashas but check varga for quality and specifics

predictionTechniques.name: Ashtakavarga Transit Timing
predictionTechniques.description: Use Sarvashtakavarga points for transit timing
methodology: Check SAV (Sarvashtakavarga) points in transit house
Combine with dasha-bhukti for precise event timing
predictionTechniques.application: Jupiter transit over house with 33 SAV points in Venus dasha = marriage timing

types.method: Progress chart by one day = one year
Chart cast when Sun-Moon angle returns to birth angle

marriage.name: Marriage Prediction and Timing
timingFactors: Jupiter transit over 7th house or Venus
High SAV points in 7th house during transit
denials: Severe afflictions to 7th house and lord
marriage.perfectTiming: When dasha, transit, and annual chart all indicate marriage simultaneously

children.name: Children Prediction and Timing
timingFactors: Jupiter transit over 5th house or natal Jupiter
genderPrediction: Check D7 for detailed gender analysis
Jupiter aspects favor male, Venus aspects favor female
denials: Severe afflictions to 5th house and lord

career.name: Career Success and Changes
careerSelection: D10 analysis for detailed career path
careerChange: New dasha beginning (especially if different element)

wealth.name: Wealth Accumulation and Timing
timingFactors: Wealth planets transit over wealth houses

health.name: Health Issues and Timing
timingFactors: Saturn transit over 1st house or Moon (Sade Sati)
Low SAV points in health houses
diseaseTypes: Sun afflicted - heart, bones, eyes, vitality
Moon afflicted - mind, emotions, fluids, stomach
Mars afflicted - blood, accidents, surgeries, fever
Mercury afflicted - nerves, skin, speech, breathing
Jupiter afflicted - liver, obesity, diabetes, ears
Saturn afflicted - bones, teeth, chronic diseases, depression
remedies: Strengthen lagna lord and weak planets
Donate items related to afflicting planet
Ayurvedic treatments based on planetary afflictions

foreign.name: Foreign Travel and Settlement
denial: No Rahu influence on travel houses
remedies: If desired: Strengthen 12th lord and Rahu
If preventing: Strengthen 4th house and Jupiter
Specific deity worship based on chart

spirituality.name: Spiritual Evolution and Moksha
guruMeeting: Strong Jupiter period with spiritual readiness

death.name: Longevity and Death Prediction
death.warning: Highly sensitive - predict only with complete expertise and ethical responsibility

lifeSpan.indicators: Weak lagna, weak 8th house, malefics in kendras
Mixed strength, some beneficial some malefic
Strong lagna, strong 8th house, benefics well-placed

dangerPeriods: Saturn transit over 8th house or Moon
Weak lagna lord dasha with afflictions
marakaDashas: Planets in 2nd/7th houses in their dashas
Weak planet dashas with no strength
death.ethicalNote: Death predictions should rarely be made; focus on life-extending remedies and precautions
death.purposeOfKnowledge: Awareness for preparation and maximizing life purpose, not creating fear

eventConfirmation.name: Multi-Level Event Confirmation
eventConfirmation.description: How to confirm event timing with multiple techniques
eventConfirmation.principle: Event manifests when multiple factors align simultaneously

levels.requirement: Yoga or house strength showing event possibility
levels.example: Strong 7th house and Venus for marriage
Jupiter transiting over 7th house or Venus

levels.requirement: Good SAV points in relevant houses
If question asked, horary shows yes

eventConfirmation.minimumRequirement: At least 3-4 levels should confirm for confident prediction
eventConfirmation.idealScenario: When 5+ levels align, event is highly certain

exampleCase.level3: Jupiter transiting 7th house, Saturn blessing from 11th
exampleCase.level4: D9 7th house has benefics, D9 Venus strong
exampleCase.level6: 2026 Varshaphal has Muntha in 7th, Venus as year lord
exampleCase.level7: Prashna chart shows marriage in 3 months

timingPrecision.name: Event Timing Precision Levels

levels.accuracy: Can predict which year event likely

timingPrecision.practicalApproach: Most astrologers work at year-month level; day-level very difficult
uncertaintyFactors: Free will can shift timing slightly
Multiple event possibilities in same period

principles.rule: If not promised in birth chart, cannot happen
principles.example: No children yoga in chart = children very difficult despite favorable dashas

principles.rule: Promised event manifests only in relevant dasha
principles.example: Marriage yoga exists but manifests only in Venus or 7th lord dasha

principles.rule: Even in right dasha, needs transit trigger
principles.example: Venus dasha for marriage needs Jupiter transit over 7th as trigger

principles.rule: Never predict on single factor alone
principles.example: Check dasha, transit, varga, and Ashtakavarga all together
Marriage prediction needs good D9, not just D1

principles.rule: Weak planets give weak results even in their dashas
principles.example: Debilitated 7th lord dasha may give delayed/difficult marriage

principles.rule: Benefics give easier manifestation, malefics give struggle
principles.example: Venus dasha marriage easier than Saturn dasha marriage

principles.rule: Events have timing windows, not exact dates usually
principles.example: Marriage likely June-September 2026, not exactly June 15th

principles.rule: Major events destined, but response and minor details have free will
principles.example: Marriage destined, but choice of partner has some free will

principles.rule: Proper remedies can modify timing and severity
principles.example: Delay difficult event or improve its quality through remedies
